case_title: HEALY, MARGE E. VS RODRIGQUEZ, PEDRO -RODRIQUEZ, PEREZ, DELGADO & CO.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEALY, MARGE E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODRIGQUEZ, PEDRO -RODRIQUEZ, PEREZ, DELGADO & CO. COURT CONCLUDES DEATH BENEFIT WAS NOT TAXABLE AS INCOME TO PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,786.05 FILED BY HEALY, MARGE E. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGQUEZ, PEDRO -RODRIQUEZ, PEREZ, DELGADO & CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO PEDRO RODRIGUEZ RODRIGUEZ PEREZ DELGADO & CO RETURNED SIGNED.

parties.name: HEALY, MARGE E. 1081 KANSAS STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107
RODRIGQUEZ, PEDRO -RODRIQUEZ, PEREZ, DELGADO & CO. 2601 MISSION STREET, STE 802 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110
